records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I'm so angry these days that I can't even get a good night's sleep.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I'm so angry these days that I can't even get a good night's sleep.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I'm so angry these days that I can't even get a good night's sleep.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in the end, we couldn't even catch those thieves!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in the end, we couldn't even catch those thieves!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in the end, we couldn't even catch those thieves!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at least our rich client gave us our money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at least our rich client gave us our money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at least our rich client gave us our money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to that, we're still able to work as detectives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to that, we're still able to work as detectives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to that, we're still able to work as detectives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... we can't say that we won!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... we can't say that we won!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... we can't say that we won!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What matters is that it all ended well, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What matters is that it all ended well, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What matters is that it all ended well, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I envy your optimism.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I envy your optimism.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I envy your optimism.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you order lunch yet? It's not hamburgers again, is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you order lunch yet? It's not hamburgers again, is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you order lunch yet? It's not hamburgers again, is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is... burgers. It's from a famous gourmet place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is... burgers. It's from a famous gourmet place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is... burgers. It's from a famous gourmet place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the one the maid recommended. I'm sure it tastes way better than the microwaved ones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the one the maid recommended. I'm sure it tastes way better than the microwaved ones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the one the maid recommended. I'm sure it tastes way better than the microwaved ones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't that the same one... she got from the phantom thief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't that the same one... she got from the phantom thief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't that the same one... she got from the phantom thief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop your fuming and let's wait for the food to arrive while watching TV.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop your fuming and let's wait for the food to arrive while watching TV.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop your fuming and let's wait for the food to arrive while watching TV.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm here now at the biggest comic event in the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm here now at the biggest comic event in the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm here now at the biggest comic event in the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The scene is intense with countless enthusiastic cosplayers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The scene is intense with countless enthusiastic cosplayers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The scene is intense with countless enthusiastic cosplayers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, there's a peculiar one over there! I'll see if I can get an interview!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, there's a peculiar one over there! I'll see if I can get an interview!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, there's a peculiar one over there! I'll see if I can get an interview!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's your name? May I call you... Mr. Square?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's your name? May I call you... Mr. Square?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's your name? May I call you... Mr. Square?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was once called a parvenu. But now, I go by the name <color=#ffd34c>Phantom Thief G.A.P.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was once called a parvenu. But now, I go by the name <color=#ffd34c>Phantom Thief G.A.P.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was once called a parvenu. But now, I go by the name <color=#ffd34c>Phantom Thief G.A.P.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phantom Thief G.A.P.? Then are you?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phantom Thief G.A.P.? Then are you?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phantom Thief G.A.P.? Then are you?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Mr. Phantom Thief G.A.P. Are you cosplaying as a phantom thief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Mr. Phantom Thief G.A.P. Are you cosplaying as a phantom thief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Mr. Phantom Thief G.A.P. Are you cosplaying as a phantom thief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cosplaying?! I am a real phantom thief!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cosplaying?! I am a real phantom thief!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cosplaying?! I am a real phantom thief!

records.m_Talk_ENG: After years of making ends meet with stealing, I awakened as Phantom Thief G.A.P.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After years of making ends meet with stealing, I awakened as Phantom Thief G.A.P.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After years of making ends meet with stealing, I awakened as Phantom Thief G.A.P.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And since I'm on live television, I'd like to send a message here instead of a calling card! The next target of mine is the famous detective
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And since I'm on live television, I'd like to send a message here instead of a calling card! The next target of mine is the famous detective
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And since I'm on live television, I'd like to send a message here instead of a calling card! The next target of mine is the famous detective
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Thank you for a fantastic interview, Mr. Square.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Thank you for a fantastic interview, Mr. Square.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Thank you for a fantastic interview, Mr. Square.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-did you get all that? And my name is Phantom Thief G.A.P...
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-did you get all that? And my name is Phantom Thief G.A.P...
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-did you get all that? And my name is Phantom Thief G.A.P...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move on to our next interviewee!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move on to our next interviewee!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move on to our next interviewee!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... there are now three phantom thieves after us...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... there are now three phantom thieves after us...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... there are now three phantom thieves after us...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's nothing to fear, Ronald Lee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's nothing to fear, Ronald Lee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's nothing to fear, Ronald Lee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if there are ten, I'll take on all of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if there are ten, I'll take on all of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if there are ten, I'll take on all of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: C-count me out of that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: C-count me out of that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: C-count me out of that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew... Let's think about it while eating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew... Let's think about it while eating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew... Let's think about it while eating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? It's empty! Where are the burgers?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? It's empty! Where are the burgers?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? It's empty! Where are the burgers?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, there's another memo...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, there's another memo...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, there's another memo...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Ah hah hah! Have you wondered what the burger from my favorite restaurant would taste like?</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Ah hah hah! Have you wondered what the burger from my favorite restaurant would taste like?</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Ah hah hah! Have you wondered what the burger from my favorite restaurant would taste like?</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I was also hungry, so Jane and I will enjoy them to the utmost!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I was also hungry, so Jane and I will enjoy them to the utmost!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I was also hungry, so Jane and I will enjoy them to the utmost!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>And in return for treating us out to these delicious burgers... I have decided my next target to be Karin's office.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>And in return for treating us out to these delicious burgers... I have decided my next target to be Karin's office.</color>

records.m_Talk_FRA: Assistant, let's begin the investigation. Cancel all other jobs that came in!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Phantom Thief J... No, JSY! I'll catch you this time!
